title: The Bumpy Ride Ahead for Commercial Vehicles and Transportation

summary.about: COVID-19’s effect on Indian commercial vehicles, freight transport and component supply chains.
summary.audience: Truck manufacturers, logistics firms, suppliers and transport policymakers.
summary.method: Combines GTAP data, India’s input-output table and industry evidence on sales and sourcing.
summary.insights: The sector’s China dependence is moderate but tier-two and tier-three suppliers are vulnerable; recovery requires supply-chain redesign and technology.
